title: Mar 20, 2026
summary: Live enrichment progress dashboard on the M&A Research Database page.

features.title: Live Enrichment Progress Dashboard
features.summary: The /ma-research page now shows real-time database build progress from the enrichment API
features.description:
Replaced the hardcoded stats bar on the M&A Research Database page with live data from the enrichment progress API.

The new Enrichment Progress section includes:
- Live stats bar showing total deals, enriched count, retriable failures, and data coverage (price, stock, options, clauses)
- A stacked horizontal bar showing deal status composition (enriched/SEC failed/extraction failed/not M&A) with color-coded legend
- Nested progress bars showing data coverage depth for enriched deals
- Year-by-year enrichment breakdown table with inline coverage bars
- Top retriable deals table showing high-filing-count deals worth retrying (e.g., Beacon Roofing, US Steel)

The section is collapsible (open by default) and fetches data on mount from GET /api/research/enrichment/progress. Includes loading skeleton and error fallback states. All existing content (Data Model, Pipeline, Research Study) remains below unchanged.
